make-a-delicious-vegan-hot-chocolate-com.name: Make A Delicious Vegan Hot Chocolate
make-a-delicious-vegan-hot-chocolate-com.original_name: Haz un rico chocolate caliente vegano
instructions: We will start our recipe, place with a blender or processor, steamed almonds, hemp seeds, frosted coconut and vanilla extract.
Ahora, agregaremos el agua de coco para procesar.
Una vez incorporados todos los ingredientes a la licuadora, comenzamos a procesar muy bien hasta que todo quede perfectamente triturado.
When perfectly liquefied, get a paddle and put the blend into it to get rid of what's grown or fiber. Reserve.
We'll put a pan into the fire and add the mixture we liquefied with the milk of almond. Add the cinnamon branch and let warm but do not boil.
Cuando veas unas burbujas en los costados de la cacerola, es momento de agregar la miel de Maple. Mezcla hasta hervir.
Baja la temperatura y deja cocinar por 10 minutos.
Once ready put out the fire and let them stand. You can decorate with more steamed almonds.
Enjoy!

make-some-delicious-and-healthy-carrot-t.name: Make Some Delicious And Healthy Carrot Tamales
make-some-delicious-and-healthy-carrot-t.original_name: Haz unos ricos y saludables tamales de zanahoria
instructions: In a large bowl, mix corn flour, butter, chicken stock, baking powder and salt up to a smooth and homogenous mass.
Agrega las zanahorias ralladas a la masa y mezcla bien para distribuir uniformemente.
Take a leaf of corn, extend a portion of mass at the centre and wrap as a package, bending the ends to close.
Put the tamales in a vapour and cook steamed for about 1 hour or till the dough is cooked and firm.
Serve hot pits with green or red salsa if you wish.

malaysian-style-watermelon-salad.name: Malaysian-style Watermelon Salad

ingredients.prep: white part only, cut into 1/2-inch cubes

ingredients.item: Peeled and chopped fresh ginger root

instructions: Boil 1 ½ cups vinegar in a medium saucepan. Add 4 tablespoons brown sugar, crushed ginger, shallots, red pepper flakes, and 1 teaspoon salt. Stir until sugar and salt dissolve; remove pickling liquid from heat.
Place watermelon rind in a large bowl; strain pickling liquid through a fine-mesh strainer over rind. Stir to combine; refrigerate at least 1 hour.
Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly brown, about 10 minutes; drain on a paper towel-lined plate. Chop or crumble bacon into pieces when cool.

Place 1/2 cup chopped ginger, garlic, lime juice, cilantro stems, remaining 1 cup vinegar, remaining 2 tablespoons brown sugar, and remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt in a blender. Blend on high speed, scraping down jar occasionally, until dressing is mostly smooth.

To assemble the salad: Place 1 cup fresh watermelon on a plate, drizzle with 2 tablespoons dressing, top with 2 tablespoons pickled rind, 1 to 2 tablespoons bacon, 1 tablespoon cilantro leaves, and 1/2 tablespoon green onion.

manis-milk-pie-argiro.name: Mani's Milk Pie
instructions: Add to a bowl, eggs, vanillas, lemon zest, salt, flour and semolina.
With a wire we beat them well.
Add the milk to a pot and add the sugar. Allow it to warm on medium heat.
We take 2 cups of lukewarm milk and dilute the egg mixture, stirring with wire.
Add them to the milk, stirring.
Allow the cream to bind for a few minutes, stirring the ingredients with wire.
Once boiled, remove the cream from the heat and add the butter. Mix to melt.
In the blender, add the almonds, sugar and cinnamon.
We grind them to dust.
Melt the butter and let it cool.

maple-bacon-mashed-potatoes.name: Maple Bacon Mashed Potatoes
instructions: Cook the bacon in a small nonstick skillet over medium heat, turning occasionally, until crisp, about 4 minutes. Transfer the bacon to a paper towel-lined plate with tongs to drain, reserving the bacon grease.
Chop the bacon strips into pieces,  then transfer to a small bowl and toss with ½ tablespoon of maple syrup. Set aside.

Add the potatoes to a large pot and cover with cold water by 1 inch (2.5 cm). Add 1 tablespoon of salt. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 15 minutes, until the potatoes are easily pierced with a fork. Drain the potatoes and return to the pot.
Add the milk, heavy cream, butter, and reserved bacon grease to a small saucepan and cook over medium-low heat until the butter melts.

Mash the potatoes with a potato masher or ricer. Pour in the warm milk mixture and stir until smooth. Add the remaining tablespoon of maple syrup and remaining 1½ teaspoons of salt and stir to combine. Add more milk or heavy cream if the potatoes are too stiff.
Transfer the potatoes to a large serving bowl, top with the maple-coated bacon, and serve.
Enjoy!

maple-pecan-french-toast-bake.name: Maple-pecan French Toast Bake
instructions: Mix milk, half-and-half, eggs, maple syrup, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl until well combined.
Layer bread slices in a greased 9x13-inch baking dish. Pour egg mixture over the bread slices. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Remove French toast from the refrigerator.
Mix brown sugar, pecans, butter, and maple syrup together; spread topping evenly over the French toast.
Bake, uncovered, in the preheated oven until puffed and golden brown, about 40 minutes.

margarita-burger.name: Margarita Burger
instructions: Make the tequila pickles: In a large, high-walled skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the carrots, jalapeño, onion, and garlic and sauté, stirring constantly, until the vegetables start to become tender but do not change color, about 3 minutes. Transfer the vegetables to a 16-ounce airtight, heat-proof container.

Return the pan to medium heat and add the tequila, white vinegar, bay leaf, black peppercorn, oregano, sugar, and salt. Bring to a boil and cook until reduced by ⅓, about 2 minutes. Pour the mixture over the vegetables and let sit for 10 minutes. Add the ice to the container and stir until completely melted. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use. The pickles can be made up to 1 week ahead.

Make the guacamole: In a large bowl, combine the lime juice, garlic, and Fresno chile. Let sit at room temperature for 10 minutes. Add the avocados and salt and use a fork to mash together. Cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly against the surface of the guacamole. Refrigerate until ready to use.
Make the black bean burgers: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C).

Add the black beans to a large bowl and use a potato masher to break down the beans until semi-smooth, with some beans left whole for texture. Add the panko bread crumbs, cilantro, scallions, jalapeño, salt, cumin, paprika, and eggs.  Stir with a wooden spoon to combine. Shape the mixture into 4 patties. Place the patties on a plate and refrigerate for 30 minutes.

Meanwhile, place the intact burger buns on a baking sheet. Brush the top of each bun with the beaten egg, then top with the sea salt. Transfer to the oven and bake until the egg wash turns golden brown, about 5 minutes.

Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the olive oil, then place the black bean patties in the pan in a single layer, working in batches if needed to avoid overcrowding. Cook until the patties begin to turn golden brown, about 3 minutes per side.

Assemble the burgers: Open the buns and spoon guacamole onto each bottom bun, spreading to cover completely. Place 2 slices of queso panela over the guacamole and top with a burger patty, followed by tequila pickles. Place the top bun on top. Serve with classic margaritas.
Enjoy!

mavromitika-with-greens-and-rice-sewage-.name: Mavromitika With Greens And Rice (sewage)
instructions: Boil the black eyes first for 10 minutes and drain them.
In clean water (1.5 litre) add the beans and let them boil for 15 minutes until soft.
Then add the rice, salt and pepper.
Add the grasses chopped.
Allow 10 minutes to boil.
Pour the food with half the olive oil and taste the salt and pepper.
In a pan with the rest of the olive oil and in low heat, let the onion wither withered and golden color.
Add the vinegar and allow for 1 to 2 minutes to evaporate.
Add the synthage to the black eye and boil for 5 minutes.
Mix them up.

meadow-munchies.name: Meadow Munchies
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix flour and baking soda together in a bowl.

Beat butter, white sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla extract in a bowl with an electric mixer until fluffy. Beat egg into the mixture using a wooden spoon. Stir in flour mixture until fully combined. Fold chocolate chips, pecans, and white chocolate into the dough.
Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto 4 ungreased baking sheets.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 12 minutes.

melted-anchovy-toast.name: Melted Anchovy Toast

ingredients.prep: grilled or toasted well and cut into 4 pieces each

instructions: In a sauté pan, combine ½ cup olive oil, 10 anchovy fillets in oil, 6 cloves garlic, thinly sliced, 1 tsp. red chile flakes, and zest of 1 lemon, cut into thin julienne slices. Slowly bring to a simmer over medium-low heat, stirring. Simmer for 2 to 3 minutes, until the garlic is soft and the anchovies have melted. I like to carefully turn the garlic slivers over so they cook evenly.
Place 2 thick pieces sourdough bread, grilled or toasted well and cut into 4 pieces each, on a platter and spoon the sauce evenly over the toast. Finish with basil leaves.

mexican-style-pork-and-beans.name: Mexican-style Pork And Beans
instructions: Sprinkle pork with salt and black pepper. Cook bacon in a large Dutch oven over medium heat until crisp and well browned; transfer to paper towel-lined plate, reserving 1/4 cup drippings in pot.

Brown pork pieces in bacon drippings over medium-high heat, 3 to 5 minutes per side. Work in batches; transfer browned pieces to a plate as they brown. Transfer all pieces back to pot, along with accumulated juices. Stir in onion, serrano pepper, broth, and tomato sauce. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low or low to maintain a low simmer. Simmer, covered, 1 hour.
Stir in beans and cactus; simmer, uncovered, until heated through, 20 minutes more. Stir in bacon. Serve over rice and garnish with avocado and cilantro.

milanese-pork-loin-recipe-comedera.name: Milanese Pork Loin Recipe
milanese-pork-loin-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de lomo de cerdo a la milanesa
instructions: Comienza por limpiar los filetes de lomo de cerdo, eliminando cualquier exceso de grasa.
Sazona los filetes con sal y pimienta al gusto por ambos lados.
Prepara tres platos hondos: uno con harina, otro con los huevos batidos y el tercero con una mezcla de pan rallado y queso parmesano.
Fits every steak first through the flour, covering them completely and shaking the excess.
Then put them in your scrambling eggs and make sure they're well covered.
Finally, pass them through the frilling and cheesebawing mix and press them slightly so that the empanized stick well.
In a large frying pan, it heats up enough vegetable oil with medium-high heat.
Fry the minced steaks for about 3 to 4 minutes on each side, or till they are golden and crispy.
Remove them from oil and place them on absorbing paper to remove excess fat.
Serve the pork back to the hot milanese with lemon cuts if you prefer.

mine-craft-creeper-cake.name: Mine Craft Creeper Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour one 9-inch square pan.

Stir sugar, 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl. Add milk, vegetable oil, egg, and vanilla extract; beat with an electric mixer on medium speed until batter is smooth. Beat in 1/2 cup boiling water. Pour into the prepared baking pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 30 to 35 minutes. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Invert onto a wire rack to cool completely, about 30 minutes.
Cut marzipan into 3 equal pieces. Add varying amounts of green food coloring to each piece to get different shades of green. Knead each piece separately to incorporate food coloring evenly.
Dust a flat work surface with 1 tablespoon confectioners' sugar. Roll out each piece of marzipan into a thin rectangle. Cut into equal-sized squares.
Combine 1/3 cup confectioners' sugar and 1 tablespoon water in a shallow dish; stir, adding more water if needed, until mixture is the consistency of cream.

Dip the back of a marzipan square in the confectioners' sugar mixture and place on the outer edge of the cake. Arrange remaining squares, alternating the 3 shades of green, randomly over the cake from the outer edges to the center. Leave 3 squares of chocolate cake exposed in the center for the Creeper's eyes and mouth. Cut into marzipan on either side of the mouth to create its characteristic shape.

mini-chocolate-cups.name: Mini Chocolate Cups
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Melt the chocolate in the top of a double boiler over simmering water, stirring frequently and scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Brush a thin layer of chocolate into each muffin cup. Refrigerate cups until chocolate is firm, about 5 minutes.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Repeat chocolate layers until cup is thickened, 7 to 10 more times. Chocolate may need to be melted again.'}
{'step': '4', 'description': 'Carefully peel paper cup off away from the chocolate cups.'}

mini-matzo-balls.name: Mini Matzo Balls

ingredients.item: Chicken fat or 2 tablespoons (1/4 stick) pareve margarine

instructions: Combine egg yolks, club soda, chicken fat, chives, coarse salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper in medium bowl; whisk to blend. Stir in matzo meal. Whisk egg whites in another medium bowl until soft peaks form. Stir 1/3 of whites into matzo mixture to loosen. Fold in remaining whites in 2 additions. Cover and chill overnight. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Bring large pot of salted water to boil. Dip 1-inch melon baller or teaspoon-size measuring spoon in boiling water, then fill with rounded scoop of batter. Immerse melon baller in water and shake to release batter. Repeat with remaining batter, dipping melon baller or measuring spoon in boiling water between scoops. Adjust heat so water simmers gently. Cook matzo balls uncovered until tender, about 25 minutes.
Using slotted spoon, transfer matzo balls to 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

minnesota-hunters-chili.name: Minnesota Hunter's Chili
instructions: Heat bacon fat in a 5-quart Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion; cook until tender, about 5 minutes. Add venison; cook until well browned, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, cook pork in a separate skillet over medium heat until browned, 10 to 15 minutes; transfer to Dutch oven. Cook beef in the same skillet over medium heat until browned, 7 to 10 minutes; transfer to Dutch oven.
Stir chili powder, cayenne pepper, garlic, and cumin into meat mixture; cook over medium heat until flavors have combined, stirring occasionally, about 30 minutes.

Stir tomato sauce, water, tomato paste, paprika, parsley, salt, and oregano into meat mixture. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to a simmer; cook for about 1 hour. Stir occasionally and add water as needed.
Stir masa harina into chili; cook until thickened, at least 30 minutes. Add more water as needed.

minute-steak-with-roasted-fennel-and-aru.name: Minute Steak With Roasted Fennel And Arugula And Caper Dressing

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
Juice and zest of 1/2 a lemon
Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Cut the fennel into thin wedges and place on a baking sheet. Drizzle with olive oil, season, and squeeze the lemon juice over it. Roast in the oven for 15 to 20 minutes, until softened and lightly charred, turning once during cooking.

Meanwhile, make the dressing by putting all the ingredients (except the olive oil) into a blender and pulsing them a few times. Slowly add the olive oil while you are pulsing, but don't overdo it, as you want to keep some texture. Taste and adjust the seasoning as necessary.

For the beef, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a non-stick frying pan until almost smoking. Season the fillet with salt and pepper until almost smoking. Season with fillet with salt and pepper and carefully add to the hot pan. Cook for 2 minutes on each side for rare; 3-4 medium; 4-5 for well done, then transfer to a plate or board, loosely cover with foil and allow to rest for a few minutes.
Arrange the fennel wedges on a serving platter. Slice the beef thinly and place in and around the fennel. Drizzle the arugula dressing over the top.

miso-shiru-recipe-lezzet.name: Miso Shiru Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 pack (about 10 g) dashi powder (haz japanese soup stock) or 800 ml dashi suy u
3 tablespoons of miso crush (white miso or red miso can be preferred)
100 g soft tofu (k&uuml cut into pieces)
1 tablespoon of dry wakame seaweed (for 10 minutes to waittip inflate)
Fresh onion instead of pırasa or green onion
Garlic can be added but traditionally used in Japanese cuisine very is not used; you can reduce the optional.
Add mushroom (shiitake, enoki) can add extra flavor and texture to the soup.

instructions: 1. If you are using ready dashi powder, boil water and mix into powder.
2. If you are using fresh dashi juice, prepare the basis for vegetable or fish juice.
3. Clit from the water of the water to the spoon.
4. Add this mixture slowly into the pot.
5. Don’t worry, boiling miso makes pleasure.
6. Add Tofu cubes and euwakame's which you inflate from the first.
7. Provide short-time heated materials to soup thoroughly.
8. Fine chopped fresh onions & brew; sprinkle on the car.
9. You can increase the nutrient by adding according to cooking or other vegetables.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

mixed-offal-saute-lezzet.name: Mixed Offal Saute
instructions: 1. Your taste tables offer for wonderful recipes.
2. Let’s start now.
3. Wash the guards.
4. Crochet other sacatates in the bowl strip;p in shape.
5. Roast the onion until the cockroach in the olive oil.
6. Friction and fine peppers and cook for 3 minutes.
7. Ö add the bottom and cook for 5-6 minutes.
8. Add other sacatates and cook the cover off in the middle fire.
9. Add and mix salt and spices.
10. Transfer from January to service plate.
11. 11. 11. 11. The place is hot beans and fresh thyme and wealth.

mocha-chocolate-chip-icebox-cake.name: Mocha Chocolate Chip Icebox Cake
instructions: Beat cream, mascarpone, sugar, espresso, and vanilla extract together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until firm peaks form.

Arrange single layer cookies in an 8-inch cake pan or springform pan, covering the bottom as much as possible; spread ⅓ whipped cream mixture evenly over cookies. Arrange another layer cookies on top, lying flat and touching; spread ½ remaining whipped cream mixture over cookies. Repeat with remaining cookies and whipped cream mixture.
Smooth top, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until flavors combine, 4 hours to overnight.

monte-carlo-cocktail.name: Monte Carlo Cocktail
instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Pour in whiskey and Benedictine.
Shake in bitters.
Cover and shake well.
Strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with maraschino cherry.

mummy-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Mummy Cookies
instructions: Prepare the dough: beat the butter with sugar until creamy. Then add the egg and let it hit. Add the flour at once and wrap it. Book the dough for 1 hour in the fridge.

Prepare the filling: in a pot, take the pumpkin puree to the fire with the sugar. When you start boiling, add the yolk and let it thicken, stirring always. Remove from the fire, add cinnamon to taste and stir. Save it till it gets cold.

Stretch the dough with a roll and cut part of it into rectangles, reserving the rest. Cover the rectangles with the pumpkin cream. Cut the remaining mass into strips and overlay them on top of the filling, as shown in the image. Then brush the mummies with the light and sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon.

Bring it to the oven, preheated at 180oC, for 10 to 15 minutes or until they are golden. Remove and make two eyes on each "mummy" with whipped cream and melted chocolate, as shown in the image. Serve.

mushroom-soup-with-dried-porcini-mushroo.name: Mushroom Soup With Dried Porcini Mushrooms
instructions: Clean the fresh mushrooms and cut them into thin slices.
Heat a pan over high heat, add some olive oil and, when it burns well, add the mushrooms along with the garlic. Sauté for 1–2 minutes, until their liquids start to grow.
Add salt, freshly ground pepper, fresh thyme and some nutmeg. Continue to sauté for 1–2 more minutes, until the mushrooms dry completey.
Add the cognac and, once the alcohol evaporates completely, remove the pan from the heat and keep the mushrooms aside.
In a pot, heat some olive oil and add the leads. Sauté over medium heat for about 5 minutes, until soft.
Add the butter and finely chopped onion and continue to sauté for another 5 minutes until the onion becomes transparent.
Sprinkle with flour and mix well for 1 minute, so that it is lightly baked.
Gradually add the warm broth, stringing continuously, and then add the sauteed mushrooms along with all their liquids.
Add the dried porcini, a little more salt and pepper, cover the pot and allow the soup to simmer for about 15 minutes, until it thickens slightly.
At the end, check the salt and pepper, withdraw from the heat and serve immediately, sprinkle with fresh chives. We accompany perfectly with toasted bread.

mussel-soup-lezzet.name: Mussel Soup
instructions: 1. Fill and boil the water into the pot.
2. Wash the midges and add it to the water that is leaked and slipped.
3. Soften Margarini room heat.
4. Clean and off Maydanosu.
5. Make the flour, margarine and milk cream thoroughly whipped in a separate container and slurry.
6. Add the flour mixture to the pot and sprinkle salt and pepper.
7. boil for 25 minutes and add lemon juice.
8. Decorate and serve with chopped parsley.
9. Add the pony pan recipe that you can offer in addition to the food.

mustard-greens-roasted-squash-and-hazeln.name: Mustard Greens, Roasted Squash, And Hazelnut Salad

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: center ribs and stems removed from tough greens, cut into 2” pieces (about 5 cups)

instructions: Place racks in top and bottom thirds of oven; preheat to 400°. Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil. Toss squash with 2 Tbsp. olive oil in a medium bowl; season to taste with salt and pepper. Spread out squash on prepared sheet and roast, turning occasionally, until tender and golden in spots, 18–20 minutes.
Meanwhile, spread out hazelnuts on a small rimmed baking sheet and toast in oven until beginning to turn golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Let cool on sheet.
Chop hazelnuts; place in a small bowl. Whisk in remaining ⅓ cup olive oil, hazelnut oil, vinegar, and sugar. Season vinaigrette to taste with salt and pepper.
Place roasted squash and mustard greens in a large bowl; toss to combine. Drizzle vinaigrette over and season with salt and pepper; toss to coat.
